spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Spring Boot 3 namespace requirements.
Add @NonNull annotations to generic type parameters to satisfy stricter null-safety requirements in the upgraded Spring Data ecosystem.
Import the @NonNull annotation from the org.jspecify library to support the new null-safety annotations.

spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Spring Boot 3 namespace requirements.
